data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not clearly demonstrate the expected outcome of the scenario where the group size changes after booking. While the linked use case outlines a multi-party sign-off workflow, it does not provide specific details on how changes in group size are handled or reported. Therefore, the validation of the persona scenario is inconclusive as there is no direct evidence supporting the expected result.
gaps: No evidence of how the system handles changes in group size after booking.
